response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software engineering with experience in C++ (National Instruments), distributed systems (Dunnhumby), and geospatial data (GISCollective). However, his primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited recent exposure to modern C++ or Rust, which are critical for this role. His geospatial work is relevant but more focused on event-driven platforms rather than high-performance routing pipelines. His problem-solving approach and willingness to learn are positives, but the misalignment in core technologies raises concerns.
strengths: Strong foundational knowledge in C++ (National Instruments) and distributed systems (Dunnhumby)
Relevant geospatial data experience with GISCollective, demonstrating familiarity with map data processing
Proven ability to learn new languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Dlang) and adapt to different tech stacks
concerns: Limited recent experience with modern C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role
Lack of direct experience with routing data pipelines or navigation systems
Primary expertise in web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than high-performance server applications
